ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensory_data" (
  "timestamp" REAL /* Time in seconds when the data was recorded */,
  "frame_counter" INTEGER /* Frame counter for the sequence of data */,
  "acc_x" REAL /* Acceleration along the X-axis */,
  "acc_y" REAL /* Acceleration along the Y-axis */,
  "acc_z" REAL /* Acceleration along the Z-axis */,
  "gyr_x" REAL /* Angular velocity along the X-axis */,
  "gyr_y" REAL /* Angular velocity along the Y-axis */,
  "gyr_z" REAL /* Angular velocity along the Z-axis */,
  "euler_x" REAL /* Euler angle for rotation around the X-axis */,
  "euler_y" REAL /* Euler angle for rotation around the Y-axis */,
  "euler_z" REAL /* Euler angle for rotation around the Z-axis */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device from which the data was collected */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the data was collected */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used to collect the data */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sensor */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the collected data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the data was collected (latitude, longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "frame_counter"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensory_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sensory_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensory_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the device (latitude, longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensory_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device from which data is collected */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the session or purpose */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the session */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the data collected during the session */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensory_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Current activity status of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed (latitude, longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sensory_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the anomaly occurred */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Time in seconds when the anomaly was detected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly */,
  "root_cause" TEXT /* Suspected root cause of the anomaly */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken to address the anomaly */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the anomaly */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the anomaly was resolved */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sensory_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
